name: creator-store-fist-visuals
description: Validate sanitized free Creator Store fist visuals attach to each equipped shop tier without third-party behavior.

args.code: local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation return c:Invoke('BuyFist','Boxing Glove').item or 'Starter fallback'

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character local hand=c and (c:FindFirstChild('RightHand') or c:FindFirstChild('Right Arm')) local g=c and c:FindFirstChild('Equipped Kaiju Gauntlet') local v=g and g:FindFirstChild('Creator Store Fist Visual',true) local anchored=0 local welds=0 local maxDistance=0 for _,d in ipairs(g and g:GetDescendants() or {}) do if d:IsA('BasePart') then if d.Anchored then anchored+=1 end if hand then maxDistance=math.max(maxDistance,(d.Position-hand.Position).Magnitude) end elseif d:IsA('WeldConstraint') then welds+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({ok=v~=nil,style=g and g:GetAttribute('FistStyle'),parts=v and #v:GetDescendants() or 0,anchored=anchored,welds=welds,maxDistance=maxDistance})

local c=game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character local hand=c and (c:FindFirstChild('RightHand') or c:FindFirstChild('Right Arm')) local g=c and c:FindFirstChild('Equipped Kaiju Gauntlet') local v=g and g:FindFirstChild('Creator Store Fist Visual',true) local anchored=0 local welds=0 for _,d in ipairs(g and g:GetDescendants() or {}) do if d:IsA('BasePart') and d.Anchored then anchored+=1 elseif d:IsA('WeldConstraint') then welds+=1 end end return tostring(v~=nil and anchored==0 and welds>0)

local c=game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character local hand=c and (c:FindFirstChild('RightHand') or c:FindFirstChild('Right Arm')) local g=c and c:FindFirstChild('Equipped Kaiju Gauntlet') local v=g and g:FindFirstChild('Creator Store Fist Visual',true) local anchored=0 local welds=0 for _,d in ipairs(g and g:GetDescendants() or {}) do if d:IsA('BasePart') and d.Anchored then anchored+=1 elseif d:IsA('WeldConstraint') then welds+=1 end end return tostring(v~=nil and #v:GetDescendants()>5 and anchored==0 and welds>0)

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character local hand=c and (c:FindFirstChild('RightHand') or c:FindFirstChild('Right Arm')) local g=c and c:FindFirstChild('Equipped Kaiju Gauntlet') local v=g and g:FindFirstChild('Creator Store Fist Visual',true) local scripts=0 local anchored=0 local welds=0 local maxDistance=0 for _,d in ipairs(g and g:GetDescendants() or {}) do if d:IsA('BasePart') then if d.Anchored then anchored+=1 end if hand then maxDistance=math.max(maxDistance,(d.Position-hand.Position).Magnitude) end elseif d:IsA('WeldConstraint') then welds+=1 elseif d:IsA('Script') or d:IsA('LocalScript') or d:IsA('ModuleScript') or d:IsA('RemoteEvent') or d:IsA('RemoteFunction') then scripts+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({ok=v~=nil,style=g and g:GetAttribute('FistStyle'),parts=v and #v:GetDescendants() or 0,scripts=scripts,anchored=anchored,welds=welds,maxDistance=maxDistance})
